SEC FORM 17-C — Current Report on Material Information/Transactions: Tambuli Infrastructure Holdings, Inc. (PSE Symbol: TMBL), Philippines.
Subject: Update on minor cyber incident involving HR file share; assessment remains non-material to operations and financial condition.
Background: On 12 April 2026, anomalous access to a staging node of the Isarog Core Banking Suite spilled over to an internal Mayumi Payroll Cloud share used for templates and test exports.
Scope: Affected folders contained policy documents (Bayanihan Data Shield Policy v2.3), generic HR forms, and a single case log; production banking systems and customer interfaces were not accessed.
Positive special-category span: HR Case Ref HR-04421 indicates the employee is a member of a labor union; the entry contains only the internal employee code and no name or contact details.
Containment: Tokens were revoked, credentials rotated, and patches applied; notifications to the NPC and SEC Philippines were made on 13 April 2026 in line with breach protocols.
Data review: No biometrics, genetic data, sex-life or sexual-orientation information, religious records, medical files, TINs, SSS numbers, or bank account numbers were present in the impacted share.
False-positive bait note: Some test files carried placeholder strings such as TIN 000-000-000-XYZ and ACCT-0000-XXXX-9999, which are invalid and used only for QA scenarios.
Materiality: The Board confirms this does not constitute MNPI under the SRC as there is no impact on earnings, cash flows, or ongoing capital-markets activities; a press statement was posted on 15 April 2026.
Cross-checks: Capital-markets systems (Sampaguita IR Portal) and finance submissions (BIR eFPS batch ref 2026-TEST-0001) were reviewed and found unaffected.
Operations: Banking reconciliations via BayanPay Link v1 and vendor tax certificates from the Cebu service center proceeded as scheduled.
ESG/DEI: We continue to uphold the Makabayan Inclusion Charter and our commitments to diversity, equity, and inclusion; this incident did not involve workforce wellness records.
Preparedness: Project teams nicknamed Laguna Lake Sailors ran a full-court press tabletop and a storm-surge recovery drill in Makati and Davao, with satisfactory results.
Investor guidance: There is no change to previously announced outlook; this update is provided for transparency and to close the loop with regulators and stakeholders.
Contact: Queries may be sent to the DPO Office via dpo@tambuli.example.ph or through the SEC/NPC public help pages; no hotline numbers are included in this notice.
